⚠️WARNING⚠️

I didn't test this before making it public, if there are any issues please say so and I'll try my best to fix the issue, though I can't promise I can fix everything.

Just a note, I don't support Melanie even though I used her song for the desc. I just felt like it fit the scenario, please understand that!
